name: Landmine Press
instructions: Hold end of barbell at shoulder

name: Single Arm Dumbbell Row
instructions: Support on bench with one hand

name: Concentration Curl
instructions: Sit with elbow on inner thigh

name: Spider Curl
instructionsAr: استلقِ على وجهك على البنش المائل

name: Tricep Kickback
instructions: Bend over with elbow at side

name: Farmer's Walk
description: Loaded carry for grip and core

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Raise legs to parallel or higher

name: Side Plank
instructions: Lift body on elbow and feet

name: Upright Row
instructions: Pull up along body to chin

name: Turkish Get Up
instructions: Stand up while keeping weight overhead
instructionsAr: قف مع إبقاء الوزن فوق الرأس

name: Handstand Push Up
instructions: Kick up to handstand against wall
instructionsAr: اصعد للوقوف على اليدين ضد الحائط

name: Dragon Flag
instructions: Lie on bench, grip behind head
instructionsAr: استلقِ على البنش، امسك خلف الرأس

name: Serratus Punch
instructions: Lie on back with dumbbell extended

name: Meadows Row
instructions: Row end of bar to hip

name: Seal Row
instructions: Lie face down on elevated bench

name: Zercher Squat
instructions: Hold bar in crooks of elbows

name: Jefferson Deadlift
instructions: Straddle bar, one foot front one back
instructionsAr: تخطى البار، رجل أمام وأخرى خلف

name: Donkey Kicks
instructions: Kick one leg back and up

name: Dead Bug
instructions: Lie on back, arms and legs up

name: Bicycle Crunch
instructions: Lie on back, hands behind head

name: Toes to Bar
instructions: Swing legs up to touch bar

name: V-Up
instructions: Raise legs and upper body simultaneously

name: Hollow Body Hold
tipsAr: أسفل الظهر يجب أن يبقى منخفضاً

name: EZ Bar Curl
instructionsAr: امسك الإي زد بار على الزوايا

name: Wall Balls
instructions: Drive up and throw to target

name: Svend Press
instructions: Press two plates together at chest

name: Spoto Press
instructions: Lower bar to 1 inch above chest

name: JM Press
instructions: Lower bar to throat/upper chest area

name: Reverse Grip Bench Press
instructions: Grip bar with palms facing you

name: Incline Cable Fly
instructions: Set bench to incline between low cables
instructionsAr: اضبط البنش مائل بين كابلات منخفضة

name: Pike Push Up
tipsAr: تطور نحو ضغط الوقوف على اليدين

name: Rack Pull
instructions: Set bar at knee height or above
instructionsAr: اضبط البار عند ارتفاع الركبة أو أعلى

name: Prone Y Raise
instructionsAr: استلقِ على وجهك على بنش مائل

name: Prone T Raise
instructions: Raise arms to sides in T
instructionsAr: استلقِ على وجهك على بنش مائل

name: Prone W Raise
instructions: Raise arms in W shape with external rotation
instructionsAr: ارفع الذراعين بشكل W مع دوران خارجي

name: Bradford Press
instructions: Press from front just over head
instructionsAr: ادفع من الأمام فوق الرأس بقليل

name: Waiter Curl
instructions: Hold dumbbell from bottom like a waiter
instructionsAr: امسك الدمبل من الأسفل مثل النادل

name: Zottman Curl
descriptionAr: كيرل صعود بقبضة علوية، نزول بقبضة سفلية
instructions: Rotate to palms down at top

name: French Press
instructions: Lie on bench with EZ bar
instructionsAr: استلقِ على البنش مع الإي زد بار

name: California Press
instructions: Lower like skull crusher then press
instructionsAr: قبضة ضيقة على الإي زد بار
أنزل مثل سكل كراشر ثم ادفع
